context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the quality instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run the following tools and address all violations:

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Write characterization test documenting current behavior.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify PASSES** — `mix test test/path/to/file_test.exs`.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Re-validate** — `mix test test/path/to/file_test.exs` must still be green.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Identify every public function (no leading `_`, not `defp`) in the changed modules.

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Write a concise description of purpose and return value.

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run `mix dialyzer` once more to confirm new typespecs are consistent.

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run `mix test` to verify doctests pass.

checklist.name: instruction-9
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Do not open the PR until every row is ✅.**
